subject: Human Resources
title: Critical Thinking and Adaptability
description: A short lesson to help you apply Critical Thinking and Adaptability.

hook.text: AI can generate a report in seconds. But it can't decide whether the report's conclusion is wise, ethical, or missing context.

buildup.text: Critical thinking—analyzing, evaluating, and synthesizing information—is the skill AI can't replicate. It requires judgment.

discovery.text: The World Economic Forum ranks critical thinking and adaptability among the top skills for 2025—outranking most technical skills.

twist.text: Most education systems still prioritize memorization—producing graduates who can recall facts but can't evaluate them.

climax.text: Companies cultivating critical thinking—through challenging work, diverse teams, and safe-to-question cultures—gain an edge.

punchline.text: Knowing facts is cheap. Knowing what to do with them is priceless.

quiz.question: Why is critical thinking valued more than many technical skills?
options: It requires human judgment and values that AI can't replicate
Technical skills are no longer needed
